name: State Bank of India
process: Choose tenure; complete KYC; fund from savings account; download FD receipt
notes: Indicative demo rate; verify live bank rate before booking

name: HDFC Bank
process: Open FD online or branch; select payout/cumulative option; verify nominee
notes: Check premature withdrawal penalty and TDS

name: Indian Bank
process: Select deposit scheme; submit KYC/nominee; fund deposit; track maturity

name: Kotak Mahindra Bank
process: Book from net banking/app; choose auto-renewal; add nominee

name: Liquid Fund
process: Complete KYC; invest lump sum; keep emergency money accessible
notes: Not a bank deposit; returns not guaranteed

name: Short Duration Debt Fund
process: Check portfolio quality; expense ratio; exit load; taxation

name: Hybrid Fund
process: Choose category; start SIP; review annually
notes: Equity and debt allocation both matter

name: Index / Flexi Cap Equity Fund
process: Use SIP; define goal; avoid short-term withdrawals

name: KYC mismatch
process: Validate Aadhaar PAN IFSC account pincode and duplicate applicant details
notes: Manual review when combined score is high

name: Failed attempts
process: Track repeated failed verification attempts and device risk
